scripts.dev:servers: concurrently "cd mcp-servers/library && npm run dev" "cd mcp-servers/cafeteria && npm run dev" "cd mcp-servers/events && npm run dev" "cd mcp-servers/academics && npm run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../mcp-servers/library && npm install && cd ../cafeteria && npm install && cd ../events && npm install && cd ../academics && npm install
